name: Reverse Interview Persona Fit
description: Assess whether a persona candidate is qualified for a target role and identify missing PersonaKit artifacts required for strong execution.

notes: Do not treat role-fit analysis as approval to modify candidate artifacts.
Proposed missing artifacts must be explicit, bounded, and prioritized.
If confidence is low, run research loop before final verdict.
Persist results to markdown report and JSONL log contract before concluding.
Pause for AJ approval before applying structural pack/session changes.
